hall_of_fame.title: support searching across multiple lines
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Ripgrep's improved search engine and Rust's regex library make this feature feasible now.

hall_of_fame.title: maximum line length
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Ripgrep's new line length option improves usability for large files.

hall_of_fame.title: Add an option similar to -o, --only-matching
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: This feature is now feasible due to improvements in the regex crate and modern Rust ecosystem.

last_resurrection.title: Option to print file paths as file URLs
last_resurrection.one_line_why: This feature succeeds now due to improved terminal and editor support for file URLs.
